sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n46755" key="h)qa/nion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἠθάνιον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <gramGrp opt="n" TEIform="gramGrp"> <gram type="dim" opt="n" TEIform="gram">Dim. of</gram> </gramGrp> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἠθμός</foreign>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0539.tlg001:53J" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hellanic.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">53J.</biblScope> </bibl>; cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἠθήνιον</foreign>.</entryFree>
